---
title: "Database administration"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Database administration}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(similR)

raw <- import_article_data("data-raw/input/institutional_articles.csv")

processed <- process_scopus(
  raw,
  column_map = c(
    title = "Title",
    authors = "Authors",
    abstract = "Abstract",
    author_keywords = "Keywords",
    doi = "DOI",
    year = "Year",
    source_title = "Source"
  ),
  source = "generic"
)

processed <- build_dimension_texts(processed)

release <- build_database_release(
  data = processed,
  previous_database = NULL,
  data_version = "2026.07",
  output_dir = "release/2026.07"
)

validate_release(release)
```

The generated database can be uploaded to GitHub Releases together with `manifest.json` and `checksums.txt`.
